phrases.en: Dan got lost on a busy street downtown.
phrases.zh: 丹在市中心一条繁忙的街道上迷路了。

phrases.en: He looked around for a friendly face.
phrases.zh: 他四处张望，想找一张友善的面孔。

phrases.en: He walked up to a passerby politely.
phrases.zh: 他礼貌地走向一位路人。

phrases.en: He said, "Excuse me, can you help me?"
phrases.zh: 他说：“打扰一下，您能帮我吗？”

phrases.en: He asked the way to the train station.
The kind stranger pointed down the road.
phrases.zh: 那位热心的陌生人指向那条路的远处。

phrases.en: He told Dan to turn left at the corner.
phrases.zh: 他告诉丹在拐角处向左拐。

phrases.en: Then he said to go straight for two blocks.
phrases.zh: 然后他说要直走两个街区。

phrases.en: Dan listened to the directions carefully.
phrases.zh: 丹仔细地听着这些方向指引。

phrases.en: He repeated them back to confirm the route.
phrases.zh: 他把这些话复述了一遍，以确认路线。

phrases.en: The stranger nodded and smiled warmly.
phrases.zh: 陌生人点了点头，温暖地笑了。

phrases.en: Dan said a sincere thank you.
Then he headed off in the right direction.
phrases.zh: 然后他朝着正确的方向出发了。
